description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form with a mix of light wood and gray exterior finishes. The structure includes two above-ground stories, with large vertical windows arranged in groups, providing ample natural light. A prominent garage is attached to one side, and a driveway wraps around the building, connecting to the main entrance. The front facade is defined by a central entryway with glass doors and a sheltered porch area. The rear of the bungalow includes a covered balcony or patio, offering outdoor living space. Minimalist landscaping with shrubs and paved surfaces complements the contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large vertical windows, attached garage, and a wraparound driveway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the bungalow with the attached garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the main entrance.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showcasing the central entryway, large windows, and the sheltered porch area.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is shown, featuring a covered balcony or patio and additional vertical windows.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the garage, driveway, and side landscaping, with less visibility of the main entrance.
